3112650.name: Laser Circle
3112650.description:
A small spherical blob finds the strength to become a full-fledged, independent form of life. Armed with its energy, which grows stronger with each level, the blob begins to destroy all those who try to consume it.

Laser Circle - A top-down shooter game where you play as a spherical blob that destroys enemies with weapons that become more powerful with each level, while the blob itself also gets stronger.

Controls:

Left Mouse Button - Shoot
WASD - Move

Game Features:

Visual Style
Weapon Enhancement
Increasing Difficulty
